INSERT INTO items(item_id, name, count) VALUES (1, 'Item A', 50);
INSERT INTO items(item_id, name, count) VALUES (2, 'Item B', 30);
INSERT INTO orders(order_id, item_id, quantity) VALUES (1, 1, 10);
INSERT INTO orders(order_id, item_id, quantity) VALUES (2, 2, 5);
SELECT item_id, name, (SELECT SUM(quantity) FROM orders WHERE orders.item_id = items.item_id) as total_ordered FROM items;
INSERT INTO products(product_id, description, count) VALUES (1, 'Product A', 100);
INSERT INTO products(product_id, description, count) VALUES (2, 'Product B', 200);
SELECT p.product_id, p.description, (SELECT SUM(o.quantity) FROM orders o INNER JOIN items i ON o.item_id = i.item_id WHERE i.name = 'Item A' AND i.count > 0) AS total_ordered FROM products p;
